title: Codex 2026 Prompting and Repository Practice · Evaluation Brief: Codex Review Verify
summary: Apply current Codex guidance across CLI, IDE, app, planning, and repository instructions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt codex review verify increment in a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prompt Codex to test, inspect the diff, review risk, and report evidence before completion.
Separate prompt instructions, AGENTS.md, skills, MCP, hooks, and config by scope and enforcement need.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
